fields.name: formsUrl
fields.label: Adaptive Form URL
fields.description: Path or full URL of the adaptive form, e.g. /abbviecloud/content/forms/af/.../linzess-savings-program.html

fields.name: formsDomain
fields.label: Forms Domain
fields.description: Base domain to fetch the form markup AND its runtime clientlibs from, e.g. https://www.linzess.com. Leave blank to use the current site origin.
